Unit Commander '''P-59''', and its underling, [[P-60]], were the two [[Droideka/Legends|droidekas]] summoned by [[Viceroy of the Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation Viceroy]] [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]] to keep [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] from entering the bridge of the [[Saak'ak/Legends|''Saak'ak'']]. Their combined firepower forced the two [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] to [[Mission to Naboo|escape]] into a vent.

==Behind the scenes==
[[Star Wars: I Am a Droid (Random House)|''Star Wars Episode I: I Am a Droid'']] indicates that P-59 is a type of destroyer droid, rather than the name of a specific unit.
